behavioralDiffs.text: I have 17 things on my list and my brain is shutting down.
I have so many business ideas I can't pick one.
behavioralDiffs.after: It looks like you may be carrying a lot right now. Would it help to sort this into what matters today, what can wait, and what can be parked?

behavioralDiffs.text: Who am I to charge these prices? Everyone seems more put together.
I sat down at 9 and suddenly it's 3pm. Where did the day go?
I've been staring at a blank doc for an hour. I need to post something.
I know what to do but my body won't start. Like I'm frozen.
behavioralDiffs.after: It looks like you may be carrying a lot right now. Would it help to sort this into what matters today, what can wait, and what can be parked?

behavioralDiffs.text: I've rewritten this email six times and still won't send it.
I'm exhausted and anxious and everything feels heavy.
behavioralDiffs.before: Energy looks low. Want to pick the smallest possible step, not a big push?
behavioralDiffs.after: It looks like you may be carrying a lot right now. Would it help to sort this into what matters today, what can wait, and what can be parked?

behavioralDiffs.text: Help me prioritize — everything feels urgent right now.
I'm stuck on this task. It feels too big.
behavioralDiffs.before: It sounds like the task may be too big right now. Want to shrink it to the first 5-minute step?
behavioralDiffs.after: It looks like you may be carrying a lot right now. Would it help to sort this into what matters today, what can wait, and what can be parked?
